isolation.notes: Production build via vite preview on port 3150; no credentials required

steps.observed: App loaded, sidebar shows neurosynth and destrieux engines
destrieux selected (highlighted), predicate browser loaded with Relations and Functions

steps.action: Wait up to 10 seconds for atlas to load (atlas is ~22MB base64 NIfTI)
steps.observed: After ~3s: brain-viewer-loading=null, brain-viewer-canvas present (402x268 WebGL canvas), no brain-viewer-error

steps.action: Set viewport to 1440x900 to reveal brain viewer (it renders below the fold at 1024x768)
steps.expected: Brain viewer visible showing 3 orthogonal slice views
steps.observed: Brain viewer visible with 3 orthogonal brain slices (axial, sagittal, coronal) rendered via WebGL; MNI coordinate display shows 'MNI: x = 0.0 y = 0.0 z = 0.0'

steps.action: Check for error indicator and console errors
steps.expected: No brain-viewer-error element, no console errors

evidence.network: GET /v2/atlas/destrieux (proxied through localhost:3150) — atlas loaded successfully (canvas dimensions 402x268 confirm WebGL render completed)

steps.action: After atlas loads, verify brain-viewer-coords element is present with initial values
steps.expected: brain-viewer-coords present, initial coords x=0.0 y=0.0 z=0.0
steps.observed: brain-viewer-coords found; x=0.0, y=0.0, z=0.0 initially

steps.action: Click on the Niivue canvas at position (1050, 640) — off-center in the axial slice region
steps.expected: Crosshair moves; coordinate display updates to non-zero values
steps.observed: Coordinates updated to x=77.8, y=14.1, z=22.0 — confirming Niivue crosshair callback is wired to the display

steps.action: Take screenshot showing coordinate display with updated values
steps.expected: Screenshot shows MNI coordinate display with non-zero values
steps.observed: Screenshot shows 'MNI: x = 77.8 y = 14.1 z = 22.0' in the coordinate display below the canvas; crosshair visibly moved in the axial slice

evidence.network: No network calls required for coordinate updates (Niivue uses WebGL callbacks)

steps.action: With destrieux engine selected and atlas loaded, set code editor to text-only query: LeftSulcus(name_) :- destrieux(name_, region) & startswith("L S", name_)
steps.expected: Query text appears in editor (returns str-only results, no VBR/VBROverlay data)
steps.observed: Query set via CodeMirror cmTile.view dispatch; editor shows query text with syntax highlighting

steps.expected: Query executes and returns results; brain viewer remains unchanged
steps.observed: Query completed; results show 'LeftSulcus' symbol with 31 rows, all name_ (str) type — no VBR columns in results

steps.action: Verify brain viewer shows base atlas without overlays and no error
steps.expected: brain-viewer-error absent; brain-viewer-canvas present; no overlays added
steps.observed: brain-viewer-error=null; brain-viewer-canvas present; no overlay-manager present; atlas still renders 3 orthogonal slices normally

evidence.network: WebSocket query executed; results returned with str column type only (no VBR/VBROverlay columns)

frictions.description: Brain viewer is positioned below the fold at default viewport width (1024x768 default agent-browser viewport). The viewer is at y~721 but viewport height is 720. Required setting viewport to 1440x900 to see it without scrolling.
frictions.resolution: Used agent-browser set viewport 1440 900 to reveal the brain viewer panel

frictions.description: CodeMirror 6 editor does not expose __cmView on the .cm-editor element (as suggested in the flow validator guidance). The view object is accessible via contentDiv.cmTile.view instead.

summary: Tested 3 assertions: all 3 passed. VAL-BRAIN-001: Niivue atlas renders correctly with 3 orthogonal slice views (axial, sagittal, coronal) after selecting destrieux engine. VAL-BRAIN-006: MNI coordinate display updates from (0,0,0) to (77.8, 14.1, 22.0) after clicking canvas. VAL-BRAIN-007: Text-only query returns 31 str rows with no VBR data; brain viewer remains at base atlas with no error or crash.
